instructions:
AGENTS.md is the primary documentation (CLAUDE.md is a symlink to it — never edit CLAUDE.md directly). README.md is a concise user-facing summary. Focus on these sections when reviewing changes:

- AGENTS.md 'Repository Structure': update if files/directories were added, removed, or renamed
- AGENTS.md 'Flake Inputs': update if flake.nix inputs changed
- AGENTS.md 'Packages & Language Runtimes': update if base.nix packages changed
- AGENTS.md 'Key Concepts': update if architectural patterns changed
- AGENTS.md 'Common Commands': update if justfile or zsh aliases changed
- AGENTS.md 'SSH Hosts': update if ssh.nix hosts changed
- AGENTS.md 'Host Composition': update if parts/hosts.nix host definitions changed
- README.md: only update if user-facing commands, machine configs, or ssh hosts changed

Do NOT update documentation for: skill file changes (they're vendored, not documented individually), formatting/linting changes, secret template changes, or nix lock file updates.
